Strategic Investment Term Sheet between North River Foods JSC (issuer listed on HOSE) and Saffron Ridge Partners Pte Ltd (investor) for a subordinated convertible note financing in Vietnam.
Instrument: convertible loan notes; pricing to be set by publicly available VWAP on HOSE at signing; no undisclosed price-sensitive inputs and no MNPI is provided herein.
Use of proceeds: general expansion of the Da Nang packaging line, as publicly announced in 2025; no new non-public project details are included in this term sheet.
Regulatory: filings/notifications to the State Securities Commission of Vietnam (SSC) and HOSE; National Competition Commission clearance only if statutory thresholds are triggered (not currently anticipated).
Privacy and DPA: Schedule DPA-VN is incorporated by reference (Decree 13 compliance; controller/processor roles, minimisation, retention markers, and third-party processing boundaries).
Status of privacy handling: no active DSARs; consent withdrawals recorded in 2024 were implemented; prior employee erasure concluded on 2025-11-03; retention review completed under Policy RP-VN/36; these items are closed and not indicative of ongoing risk.
Data Export Approval (intentional positive): company Data Protection Lead approved cross-border transfer of payroll metadata to Azure Fern Bank SG for salary disbursement under standard contractual clauses; Approval Ref: EXP-VN-00X0; effective date 2026-07-01.
Settlement mechanics: VND payments via Monsoon Bank Vietnam, branch code VN-XYZ-000, account reference 99-AB-123456; operational mailbox treasury@northriverfoods.example; public helpline 1900-000-000 for generic inquiries.
Employee onboarding/KYC: Form OB-21 (generic fields only); no national ID numbers, home addresses, or personal phone numbers collected; role, department, and business email maintained per minimisation policy.
Disclosure and MNPI: Issuer confirms all material transaction information has been publicly disclosed via HOSE Notice No. HN-000X dated 2026-02-14; no non-public price-sensitive information is shared in this document.
Securities terms: tentative listing of converted equity on HNX subject to approvals; temporary code NRV-TS-2026 and placeholder ISIN-like VN00NRV000X0 (invalid); final identifiers to be assigned post-SSC confirmation.
Conditions precedent: corporate approvals, SSC acknowledgement, AML/KYC completion per Circular 16/2023/TT-NHNN; no employee consent withdrawals pending and no DSAR backlog.
Retention and minimisation: data retained for 36 months under RP-VN/36; minimised counterparty fields only; deletion schedule enforced with next review 2027-01; nothing in this clause creates a right to immediate erasure.
Governing law and dispute resolution: laws of the Socialist Republic of Vietnam; VIAC arbitration in Ho Chi Minh City; Vietnamese language controls.
Timing and binding effect: non-binding until definitive agreements; anticipated signing Q3 2026; this term sheet does not instruct any live cross-border transmission other than the approved payroll metadata in the Data Export Approval above.
